key.description: Key within the secret holding the database password.
key.title: key

name.description: Name of the secret holding the database password.
name.title: name

automountServiceAccountToken.description: Mount the service account token into Matomo pods. No workload in this chart uses the Kubernetes API; enable only if a custom sidecar needs it.
automountServiceAccountToken.title: automountServiceAccountToken

enabled.description: Enable the cli Deployment (runs supervisord for one-off `console` commands via `kubectl exec`).
enabled.title: enabled

livenessProbe.description: Liveness probe for the cli container (checks supervisord is running).
livenessProbe.title: livenessProbe

readinessProbe.description: Readiness probe for the cli container (checks supervisord is running).
readinessProbe.title: readinessProbe

replicas.description: Number of replicas for the cli Deployment.
replicas.title: replicas

resources.description: Default resources for the Matomo cli container.
resources.title: resources

config.description: Full install.json content, replacing the chart's built-in default when set.
config.title: config

command.description: Command run by the core:archive CronJob.
command.title: command

labels.description: Labels applied to the coreArchive CronJob (name, instance, component, part-of, managed-by).
labels.title: labels

resources.description: Default resources for the core:archive cronjob.
resources.title: resources

command.description: Command run by the scheduled-tasks CronJob.
command.title: command

labels.description: Labels applied to the scheduledTasks CronJob (name, instance, component, part-of, managed-by).
labels.title: labels

php.description: PHP configuration overrides for the scheduled-tasks CronJob.
php.title: php

resources.description: Default resources for the scheduled-tasks cronjob.
resources.title: resources

enabled.description: Enable the dashboard Deployment and Service.
enabled.title: enabled

exporter.description: php-fpm_exporter (fpm-metrics) sidecar probes for the dashboard pod.

livenessProbe.description: Liveness probe for the dashboard php-fpm_exporter (fpm-metrics) container.
livenessProbe.title: livenessProbe

readinessProbe.description: Readiness probe for the dashboard php-fpm_exporter (fpm-metrics) container.
readinessProbe.title: readinessProbe

resources.description: Default resources for the dashboard php-fpm_exporter (fpm-metrics) container.
resources.title: resources

exporter.title: exporter

firstuser.description: Credentials for the first (super)user, applied by the init container on install.
firstuser.title: firstuser

hostname.description: Hostname used for the dashboard Ingress/HTTPRoute rule.
hostname.title: hostname

annotations.description: Extra annotations for the dashboard Ingress.
annotations.title: annotations

loadbalancer.description: Create a LoadBalancer Service for the dashboard, used as the Ingress/HTTPRoute backend when true.
loadbalancer.title: loadbalancer

conf.description: Override the full dashboard nginx configuration (nginx.conf, fastcgi_params, mime.types). As: conf:   nginx.conf: |     worker_processes 5;     load_module modules/ngx_http_geoip2_module.so;     ...   fastcgi_params: |     fastcgi_param   COUNTRY_CODE            $geoip2_data_country_code;     fastcgi_param   QUERY_STRING            $query_string;     fastcgi_param   REQUEST_METHOD          $request_method;     ...   mime.types: |     types {       text/html                                        html htm shtml;       text/css                                         css;       text/xml                                         xml;       ...
conf.title: conf

image.description: Override the nginx image used for the dashboard (falls back to `nginx.image` when empty).
image.title: image

livenessProbe.description: Liveness probe for the dashboard nginx container.
livenessProbe.title: livenessProbe

nginxWorkerProcesses.description: Worker process count for the dashboard nginx.
nginxWorkerProcesses.title: nginxWorkerProcesses

readinessProbe.description: Readiness probe for the dashboard nginx container.
readinessProbe.title: readinessProbe

replicas.description: Number of replicas for the dashboard Deployment.
replicas.title: replicas

secretName.description: Existing TLS secret name for the dashboard ingress.
secretName.title: secretName

sidecars.description: Extra containers to run alongside the dashboard pod. Added like this: sidecars: - name: fpm-metrics   image: hipages/php-fpm_exporter:2.2.0   imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent   resources:     limits:       cpu: 500m       memory: 256Mi     requests:       cpu: 40m       memory: 32Mi
sidecars.title: sidecars

tls.description: Add a TLS block to the dashboard Ingress for `hostname`.
tls.title: tls

whitelist.description: List of CIDRs allowed to reach the dashboard Ingress (nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/whitelist-source-range). Empty disables the restriction.
whitelist.title: whitelist

env.description: Env variables to inject, if any.
env.title: env

extralabels.description: Extra labels applied to Matomo pods (dashboard, tracker, cli, cronjobs, queuedtracking).
extralabels.title: extralabels

gatewayApi.description: Gateway API support. When enabled, HTTPRoutes are created for the dashboard and tracker (using their `hostname` values) instead of - or alongside - the Ingress resources. Requires the Gateway API CRDs and a Gateway; TLS is terminated on the Gateway listener, not in the chart.

parentRefs.description: parentRefs applied to all HTTPRoutes, e.g.: parentRefs:   - name: my-gateway     namespace: my-namespace     sectionName: http
parentRefs.title: parentRefs

gatewayApi.title: gatewayApi

image.description: Which image to use for Matomo deployment.
image.title: image

annotations.description: Extra annotations applied to both the dashboard and tracker Ingress resources.
annotations.title: annotations

enabled.description: Create Ingress resources for the dashboard and tracker.
enabled.title: enabled

extralabels.description: Extra labels for the dashboard and tracker Ingress resources.
extralabels.title: extralabels

initResources.description: Resources for the shared matomo-init init container (runs on every workload: dashboard, tracker, cli, cronjobs, queuedtracking, pre-upgrade and post-install Jobs).
initResources.title: initResources

installCommand.description: Install command. If already installed, it just creates the needed config.
installCommand.title: installCommand

license.description: Reference to a secret holding a premium plugin license, if any.
license.title: license

livenessProbe.description: Liveness probe for the Matomo php-fpm containers (dashboard, tracker).
livenessProbe.title: livenessProbe

php.description: php.ini overrides for the dashboard and core:archive php-fpm containers.
php.title: php

phpfpm.description: php-fpm pool tuning for the dashboard and core:archive php-fpm containers.
phpfpm.title: phpfpm

postInstallCommand.description: Command to run in a post-install Job. The Job (and its resources) is only created when this is non-empty.
postInstallCommand.title: postInstallCommand

postInstallResources.description: Default resources for the post-install Job container.
postInstallResources.title: postInstallResources

postInstallSleepTime.description: Seconds the post-install Job sleeps before running `postInstallCommand` (gives Matomo time to finish bootstrapping).
postInstallSleepTime.title: postInstallSleepTime

preUpgradeCommand.description: Command to run in a pre-upgrade Job. The Job (and its resources) is only created when this is non-empty.
preUpgradeCommand.title: preUpgradeCommand

preUpgradeResources.description: Default resources for the pre-upgrade Job container.
preUpgradeResources.title: preUpgradeResources

preUpgradeSleepTime.description: Seconds the pre-upgrade Job sleeps before running `preUpgradeCommand`.
preUpgradeSleepTime.title: preUpgradeSleepTime

resources.title: resources

enabled.description: Enable the queuedtracking:process worker deployment. Required when QueuedTracking runs with processDuringTrackingRequest disabled.
enabled.title: enabled

livenessProbe.description: Liveness probe for the queuedtracking-process container (checks supervisord is running). Overriding replaces the default entirely. Example: livenessProbe:   exec:     command:     - /bin/sh     - -c     - "ps -A | grep supervisord"   initialDelaySeconds: 15   periodSeconds: 20
livenessProbe.title: livenessProbe

numProcs.description: Number of supervisord worker processes for queuedtracking:process per pod.
numProcs.title: numProcs

readinessProbe.description: Readiness probe for the queuedtracking-process container (checks supervisord is running).
readinessProbe.title: readinessProbe

replicas.title: replicas

resources.title: resources

readinessProbe.description: Readiness probe for the Matomo php-fpm containers (dashboard, tracker).
readinessProbe.title: readinessProbe

resources.description: Default resources for the Matomo php-fpm container (dashboard).
resources.title: resources

enabled.description: Enable the tracker Deployment and Service.
enabled.title: enabled

exporter.description: php-fpm_exporter (fpm-metrics) sidecar probes for the tracker pod.

resources.title: resources

annotations.title: annotations

livenessProbe.description: Liveness probe for the tracker nginx container.
livenessProbe.title: livenessProbe

nginxWorkerProcesses.description: Worker process count for the tracker nginx.
nginxWorkerProcesses.title: nginxWorkerProcesses

readinessProbe.description: Readiness probe for the tracker nginx container.
readinessProbe.title: readinessProbe

resources.description: Default resources for the tracker nginx container.
resources.title: resources

phpfpm.description: php-fpm pool tuning for the tracker (process manager type, max/spare children, idle timeout, max requests, status path).
phpfpm.title: phpfpm

replicas.title: replicas

resources.title: resources

secretName.title: secretName

tls.title: tls

waitForDbResources.description: Resources for the wait-for-db init container (pre-upgrade and post-install Jobs only).
waitForDbResources.title: waitForDbResources

namespace.description: Namespace to install Matomo in, default matomo.
namespace.title: namespace

networkPolicy.description: NetworkPolicy for the Matomo workloads. When enabled, one NetworkPolicy per component (dashboard, tracker, cli, queuedtracking monitor/process) is created. The default rule allows all ingress, which changes nothing functionally but makes every pod covered by a policy; tighten by overriding `networkPolicy.ingress` for your environment.

ingress.description: Ingress rules applied to every component policy. Default: allow all.
ingress.title: ingress

networkPolicy.title: networkPolicy

nginx.description: Default nginx image and settings shared by the dashboard (unless `matomo.dashboard.nginx.image` is set) and the tracker.

image.description: nginx image used for the dashboard and tracker.
image.title: image

imagePullSecrets.description: Image pull secrets for the nginx image.
imagePullSecrets.title: imagePullSecrets

resources.description: Default resources for the dashboard nginx container.
resources.title: resources

runAsUser.description: run the nginx container as this user id.
runAsUser.title: runAsUser

nginx.title: nginx
